utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding fields. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details (including costs):
- health_coverage: Describes plan scope (physical and mental, German statutory requirements), includes cost (€110/month) and deductible. Fully specified with costs.
- property_coverage: Specifies home/contents focus (photography equipment and personal belongings protection), includes cost (€55/month) and deductible. Fully specified with costs.
- travel_coverage: Specifies travel insurance scope (adventure travel and business trips), includes cost (€50/month) and deductible. Fully specified with costs.
- additional_services: Lists enhancement services (health assessment, rate lock) and includes costs (health assessment free, rate lock €15/month). Fully specified with costs.
- total_budget: Provides monthly and annual totals, notes deductibles context, rate guarantee terms, and no fees. Includes complete monthly/annual breakdown. Fully specified.
All 5 items are present and include required cost details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three specific policies: HealthFirst Standard Plan (health), HomeFirst Standard Coverage (property), and InsurePlus Standard Travel Plan (travel). I matched each to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings: HealthFirst Standard Plan under primary_health_coverage.physical_health, HomeFirst Standard Coverage under property_protection.home_content, and InsurePlus Standard Plan under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.
